title: Bridge Essay: Predicting narcissistic personality traits from brain and psychological features

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Wind and pride — ego, narcissism, social dominance, self-esteem, status, social hierarchy in neuroscience, self-enhancement, hubris.

**Predicting narcissistic personality traits from brain and psychological features: Asupervised machine learning approach.** — Soc Neurosci. PMID: 37497589. DOI: 10.1080/17470919.2023.2242094. Narcissism is amultifaceted construct often linked to pathological conditions whose neural correlates are still poorly understood. Previous studies have reported inconsistent findings related to the neural underpinnings of narcissism, probably due to methodological limitations such as the low number of participants or the use of mass univariate methods.
